infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to photograph your dough and starter at each stage.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to select photos of your dough or starter.

web.name: Bread Lab
web.description: Bread Lab is a sourdough baker's companion: track starter feeds, log pH and temperature readings, run recipe phases with live timers, chart fermentation over time, and bake with volume tracking and notes.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Bread Lab to access your photos to document your dough.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Bread Lab to use your camera to photograph your dough.
